string.text: Find for Nimble: Trophy "Ingram Mac10"
Nimble asked me to find a trophy weapon for him. He left me the coordinates.
Return to Nimble: Trophy "Ingram Mac10"
Return the trophy weapon to the client. You are not allowed to use it. If Nimble is not at Skadovsk, wait for him to return.
Find for Nimble: Trophy "AK-47"
Nimble asked me to find a trophy weapon for him. He left me the coordinates.
Return to Nimble: Trophy "AK-47"
Return the trophy weapon to the client. You are not allowed to use it. If Nimble is not at Skadovsk, wait for him to return.
Find for Nimble: Trophy "Mossberg 590Mk.L"
Nimble asked me to find a trophy weapon for him. He left me the coordinates.
Return to Nimble: Trophy "Mossberg 590Mk.L"
Return the trophy weapon to the client. You are not allowed to use it. If Nimble is not at Skadovsk, wait for him to return.
Find for Nimble: Trophy "Steyr AUG SS190"
Nimble asked me to find a trophy weapon for him. He left me the coordinates.
Return to Nimble: Trophy "Steyr AUG SS190"
Return the trophy weapon to the client. You are not allowed to use it. If Nimble is not at Skadovsk, wait for him to return.
Important Package: Find Kanevsky
To deliver the package to Kanevsky, I need to find him first.
Important Package: Deliver to Kanevsky
Kanevsky has been found. I need to give him the package from the Avenger.
Courier: Deliver the package to Markovich
A stalker named Petka Razmandyay asked me to deliver a package with subscription payment to the local treasurer in Skadovsk. According to Petka, Markovich will compensate me for travel expenses.
Search for Information: Talk to the local treasurer
According to available information, the local treasurer knows something about the crashed helicopters. I need to find out what exactly.
Important Info: Talk to Makovetsky
From my conversation with Markovich, it became clear that one of the pilots survived. But where to find him is still unknown. I should speak with the local Transmuter.
Important Info: Search for the unknown artifact
According to unconfirmed rumors, an unknown artifact might be located near the sawmill. I need to check the area.
Important Info: Bring the artifact to Doctor Makovetsky
The unknown artifact has been found. I need to deliver it to Doctor Makovetsky in exchange for information about the surviving pilot.
Pilot: Talk to the Informant
Apparently, Iĺll need to get to Jupiter. The Transmuter advised me to speak with the Informant.
Pilot: Travel to Jupiter
The Guide is the only one in Skadovsk who knows the way to Jupiter. I need to arrange a trip with him.
Journey: Walk with the stalker to Skadovsk

The stalker Petka Razmandyay asked me to deliver a package to Skadovsk and promised a reward. Conveniently, the people on the base might know something about the crashed helicopters. Itĺs worth going there. The guide agreed to show the way.
Journey: Reach Skadovsk
I strayed too far from the guide-stalker. Luckily, the PDA map marker is still there. Iĺll have to finish the trip alone.
Journey: Reach Skadovsk
Looted a dead rookie and found some info about a place called Skadovsk. Might be worth checking outů
Journey: Reach Skadovsk
The stalker who agreed to guide me has died. The PDA still shows the route, so Iĺll have to make the trip alone.
Raid: Meet with the "Elbrus" group
I need to meet with Elbrus' team and take command. But first, I have to reach the meeting point near the port cranes.
Raid: Secure the hill
To assault the bandit base, we need to take the high ground near the main gate.
Raid: Fire the first shot
The Elbrus squad is waiting for my signal ľ I need to fire the first shot.
Raid: Eliminate Chapay and his gang
We need to find and eliminate the bandit leader, Chapay, along with all his guards.
Raid: Collect the reward
The mission is complete ľ the bandits are dead. I should return to Skadovsk and speak with Sword for my reward.
Delivery: Pick up the Monolith case
A wounded Monolith fighter asked me to take his case to Pripyat, to deliver it to the leader ľ Cyborg. But first, I need to retrieve the case.
Delivery: Take Leon's case to Pripyat
A dying Monolith soldier asked me to deliver a case to their leader, Cyborg. Their base is in Pripyat.
Delivery: Go to the Prometheus Cinema
Leon gave me the coordinates of the Monolith base. If he's right, it should be located in the Prometheus Cinema.
Delivery: Hand over the case to the head of security
I must deliver the case to the Monolith leader, Cyborg, through the head of security.
Delivery: Receive the reward
Surprisingly, there was no fighting. The head of security even ordered a reward for me. I can collect it from Mitrofan, the local trader.
Trust: Go to the substation workshops
The bandit boss Chapay ordered me to deal with a traitor ľ Jackal. According to him, Jackal is in the area near the substation workshops. He sent the coordinates to my PDA.
Trust: Find Jackal
The substation workshops are occupied by mercenaries ľ they've set up a temporary base there. Judging by their numbers, finding and killing Jackal won't be easy.
Trust: Retrieve Chapay's gun
Most likely, Jackal is hiding the gun in his backpack. I need to loot the corpse and take the piece.
Trust: Bring the gun to Chapay
The mission is done ľ the custom gun is retrieved. I need to bring it to Chapay and claim the reward.
Contact: Meet with the agent
I received a letter from the agent with a callsign and a marked meeting point on the map. I need to check the designated area.
Cell: Search the SBU cell
The contact gave me the coordinates of a stash created by one of our agents. I need to check the stash.
Find for Kochubey: Flashlight with "Messler" optics
Kochubey asked me to find a lost flashlight for him. He left me the coordinates.
Return to Kochubey: Flashlight with "Messler" optics
Return the flashlight to Kochubey and receive the promised reward.
Kardan's Jubilee: Talk to Zhulyabsky
According to Boroda, Zhulyabsky has information about the location of the treasured bottle. I need to talk to the trader and find out where to get the "Baileys".
Kardan's Jubilee: Find the treasured bottle

Kardan, the local mechanic, has a birthday soon. Boroda wants to present him with a valuable gift on behalf of the community ľ a bottle of rare liquor. However, he doesn't know exactly where to find it. That's why he assigned me the task. Besides, I've quit drinking and will definitely deliver this bottle unopened.
Kardan's Jubilee: Return to Boroda
Bring the "Baileys" to Boroda so he can save it for Kardan's birthday. Boroda promised a generous reward for the completed task.
Urgent Order: Talk to Gavr
Chapaev said Gavr is heading towards Jupiter. I can accompany him.
Urgent Order: Find the "Pathfinder" binoculars
Chapaev, the bandit leader in Zaton, tasked me with finding a special army binocular. Coordinates are obtained, the mission is clear ľ I can proceed.
Urgent Order: Return to Chapaev
The army binoculars "Pathfinder" have been found. I need to return them to Chapaev and claim the reward.
"Mutant Wave": Talk to Noy
Go to the barge and talk to Noy. It seems this lunatic is planning something.
"Mutant Wave": Get a sniper rifle
I need to get a sniper rifle as soon as possible. The mutant wave is about to arrive any minute.
"Mutant Wave": Take a firing position
Noy is asking for help to defend the barge from mutants. I need to take a defensive position.
"Mutant Wave": Hold the defense
The sniper position is taken, now I have to hold the defense. David, the defense operation leader, must survive.
"Mutant Wave": Continue defending the barge
Hold the defense of the barge. David, the defense operation leader, must survive.
"Mutant Wave": Kill the Controller near the port cranes
A Controller was spotted near the port cranes. I need to kill it.
"Mutant Wave": Neutralize the Controller at "Shevchenko"
A Controller was spotted at Shevchenko. I need to kill it.
"Mutant Wave": Kill the Controller near the "stalker camp"
A Controller was spotted near the stalker camp. I need to kill it.
"Mutant Wave": Talk to Noy
The mutant wave has been defeated. I need to talk to Noy.
Squad "Skat": Find the access key for the helicopters
The electronics in the found "Skat" squad helicopter are burned out, and all doors are locked. The doors can only be opened using the backup access key.
Find Garin: Detector repair toolkit
Garin asked me to get special tools for repairing and upgrading detectors.
Deliver to Garin: Detector repair toolkit
Garin asked me to get special tools for repairing and upgrading detectors.
Interception: Reach the mercenary camp
Get to the mercenary camp where a detained SBU agent is supposedly held.
Interception: Rescue the prisoner
To free the captive agent, the entire campĺs guards must be neutralized.
Interception: Talk to the agent
Start a conversation with the captive agent.
Interception: Escort the agent to Yanov station
The SBU agent needs to be escorted safely to Yanov station.
Pilot: Question Azot about the pilot
Obtain information about the pilot from Azot.
Pilot: Enter the bunker to meet scientists
Enter the bunker. The pilot might still be there.
Pilot: Find and talk to the pilot in the bunker
Locate the pilot and speak with him.
Pilot: Return to Zaton
Information received. Sokolov gave a lead on Zaton and said he would provide coordinates for the crashed helicopters once I arrive. Find the Pilot at Yanov station and head to Zaton with him.
"Named Weapon": Go to Kopachi village
Arrive at Kopachi village.
"Named Weapon": Check the attic
Inspect the village council attic ľ Stormbeaker was stunned there.
"Named Weapon": Show the PDA to Stormbeaker
A PDA with an unknown OS version was found in the backpack of a dead Monolith member. The data is encrypted and must be given to Stormbeaker.
"Named Weapon": Explore the cement plant area
Stormbeaker managed to decrypt the PDA data. Among other things, it contained a map marking the cement plant. I need to go there and find the named Vintar rifle.
"Named Weapon": Return to Stormbeaker
The weapon has been found. I need to deliver it to Stormbeaker and decide what to do next.
Tunnel Defense: Help the stalkers
A wave of mutants is heading for the "Dawn" faction base, intending to destroy everything alive there. Helping the "Dawn" faction defend against the enemies could earn a fair reward.
Tunnel Defense: Talk to Nazar
The mutant attack has been repelled. I need to speak with the faction commander and claim the deserved reward.
Night Snipers: Head to the quarry
You need to sneak to the quarry and check if anyone is there.
Night Snipers: Eliminate the shooters
According to Neon, unknown villains have been spotted at the quarry shooting stalkers with unknown weapons. They must be eliminated.
Night Snipers: Chase the fugitive
During the clearing of the quarry, one bandit managed to escape. You must catch and kill him as soon as possible.
Night Snipers: Return to Neon
Task complete, the shooters are defeated. Neon promised a good reward.
Raid: Escort the scientists to the mine
You need to ensure the research team can reach the mine safely. Professor Bondar must survive.
Raid: Talk to Bondar
Mission successfully completed. You need to get a reward from Professor Bondar.
Personal Locker: Check the personal locker
The "Dawn" faction allocated me a personal locker, it needs to be checked.
Night Meeting: Meet with the contact
Go to the helicopter pad area to meet with the SBU contact.
Kostopravĺs Order: Find the "CCA72" medkit
The medic from Yanov station asked me to get a special medical kit that is presumably located at the "Jupiter" factory.
Kostopravĺs Order: Deliver the "CCA72" medkit to the medic
The special medkit was found. You need to deliver it to Kostoprav and get your reward.
Uncle Yarĺs Task: Find the "Suzanna" camera
Uncle Yar asked me for a small favor ľ to find a camera lost by a newcomer.
Uncle Yarĺs Task: Return the "Suzanna" camera
The device has been found. You need to return to Uncle Yar and collect your reward.
Hawaiianĺs Request: Find the case
Hawaiian, a trader at Yanov station, asked me to find a case lost in Pripyat.
Hawaiianĺs Request: Deliver the case to Yanov
The case has been found. You need to deliver it to Hawaiian at Yanov and get the reward.
Dangerous Work: Clear the Snorksĺ lair
According to the "Dawn" faction leader, a dangerous mutant lair of snorks was found near the half-station. I made a contract to clear it. The contract must be fulfilled.
Dangerous Work: Report completion to Nazar
The snorks are destroyed. You can return to Nazar for your reward.
Missing Squad: Meet with the squad
A mercenary group is waiting for me by the main gates. I need to discuss the details of the upcoming operation with their leader.
Missing Squad: Follow the squad
Follow the mercenary squad.
Missing Squad: Clear the perimeter
A large group of mutants and zombified have appeared near the control point. The area must be secured by neutralizing all dangerous creatures.
Missing Squad: Check the second floor
The second floor must be checked Ś thatĺs where the last signal from the missing mercenary group came from.
Missing Squad: Escape the building

Our squad was attacked by a controller. I managed to use "Psychedelin" in time Ś it saved my life, but the others were unluckyů Now they are zombified. We need to get out of the building as soon as possible. Note: The controllerĺs aura prevents me from using my weapons.
Missing Squad: Talk to Molfar
I managed to escape the building, but the controller is still alive and dangerous. I need to inform Molfar and take action. We may need to regroup the squad.
Missing Squad: Talk to the new squad leader
A new mercenary group is waiting by the main gates. I need to talk to their commander and plan the upcoming operation.
Missing Squad: Get "Psychedelin"
To ensure the success of the operation, I need to get four packs of the drug "Psychedelin."
Missing Squad: Deliver the drugs to the squad leader
"Psychedelin" found. It must be handed over to the mercenary group commander, who will distribute it to the squad members.
Missing Squad: Escort the squad to the factory
Go with the new mercenary squad to the "Jupiter" factory.
Missing Squad: Clear the pre-shop area
You must eliminate the controller, zombified, and other enemies.
Missing Squad: Report completion to Molfar
Task completed. The controller and his victims are dead. You need to inform Molfar.
Strange Activity: Clear the burrow near the cement plant
Secure the area from mutants entrenched near the cement plant.
Strange Activity: Clear the burrow on the Jupiter factory territory
Secure the area from mutants entrenched on the Jupiter factory territory.
Strange Activity: Clear the burrow south of Jupiter
Find and destroy the burrow located in the southern outskirts of Jupiter.
Strange Activity: Clear the burrow near the railway
Destroy the burrow near the railway.
Strange Activity: Report completion to Nazar
Task completed, burrows cleared. You can return to Nazar.
Strange Activity: Clear the last burrow near the "Volkhov" SAM site
Another burrow has been discovered. It needs to be secured.
Strange Activity: Talk to Nazar
Task completed. Now you can collect your reward.
Unknown Species: Obtain a sample of an unknown artifact
Discover an unknown species using the "Seraphim" detector.
Unknown Species: Show the sample to Herman
Bring the unknown artifact to Herman.
Unknown Species: Find other samples
Herman reported that the number of such species is increasing. For a successful experiment, at least six samples are required. One sample is already obtained.
Unknown Species: Find four more samples
For a successful experiment, at least six samples are required. Two samples are already obtained.
Unknown Species: Find three more samples
For a successful experiment, at least six samples are required. Three samples are already obtained.
Unknown Species: Find two more samples
For a successful experiment, at least six samples are required. Four samples are already obtained.
Unknown Species: Find the last sample
For a successful experiment, at least six samples are required. Five samples are already obtained.
Unknown Species: Return the last sample
Give the missing samples to Herman.
Unknown Species: Wait for the experiment to finish
Samples collected, now a scientific experiment is needed for their full analysis. Herman decided to conduct the experiment today. Wait for the experiment to finish and then return for your reward.
Unknown Species: Talk to Herman
Herman reported the experiment was successful. You need to talk to Herman.
Unknown Species: Show the samples to Herman
Bring the unknown artifacts to Herman.
Spatial Teleport: Find the Spatial Anomaly

A new mission arrived from the General Staff. Command demands an urgent departure to Dark Valley to search for a missing SBU agent and some documents of national importance. There is also information that a spatial anomaly is located near Jupiter, which, if used correctly, can send a person anywhere. Command believes I could use this anomaly to travel to Dark Valley. Other routes to Dark Valley are currently unavailable.
Science Report: Find the Professor
According to the contact, the professor disappeared near the river port. You need to go there and find him.
Science Report: Deliver the papers to the contact
Information received, now you need to deliver it to the contact.
Science Briefing: Search the reward stash
Command provided me with a stash containing compensation for expenses.
Dirty Work: Follow the PDA signal
The PDA signal indicates Kasilov's location is the laundry. You need to get closer.
Dirty Work: Kill Colonel Kasilov
Kill Colonel Kasilov. Such is the will of the Great Monolith.
Dirty Work: Search Kasilov's body
There should be a PDA with important information in Colonel Kasilov's backpack. You need to take it.
Dirty Work: Return to the commander
Deliver Kasilov's PDA to the Monolith base and give it to Cyborg.
Dirty Work: Chase and kill Kasilov
Quiet approach failed, Kasilov escaped... You need to catch up and shoot him.
Psi-Radiation Surge: Clear the zone of zombified
Instruments detected a very strong psi-radiation surge that zombified a huge number of stalkers. You need to secure the Zone by neutralizing at least four hundred zombified.
"Operation Volcano": Meet the squad in the courtyard
Colonel Kovalsky organized a special operation to destroy Monolith concentrations inside the Prometheus Cinema. I'm participating, and to start, I need to meet the squad in the courtyard.
"Operation Volcano": Follow the squad leader
The operation has started; you need to follow the special squad leader.
"Operation Volcano": Take a firing position
Take a firing position on the 2nd floor of the KBO building.
"Operation Volcano": Eliminate Monolith concentrations
Engage the enemy with lethal force until completely eliminated.
"Operation Volcano": Talk to the squad leader
Operation completed, return to base with surviving squad members.
"Operation Volcano": Report success to Kovalsky
You need to report the successful operation to Kovalsky.
"Bloodsucker Vaccine": Ask about NG-7 from Ozersky

In an apartment in Pripyat, I was stunned by a bloodsucker. Strangely, I woke up alone. I found a note saying the bloodsucker needs a vaccine, called NG-7, which is why he left me alone. Since he didn't attack me, I need to help him by visiting Ozersky and asking about NG-7.
"Bloodsucker Vaccine": Buy NG-7 from Ozersky
Ozersky agreed to sell me NG-7 for 5400. I need to buy this vaccine from him.
"Bloodsucker Vaccine": Return to the previous meeting place
I have the vaccine. Need to give it to the bloodsucker.
"Bloodsucker Vaccine": Collect the reward
The bloodsucker left me a reward.
"Bloodsucker Vaccine": Search the room
After waking up, I noticed that the NG-7 vaccine I bought disappeared. The bloodsucker took what he wanted. The note mentioned a reward, possibly somewhere in the room.
"Missing Guide": Descend into the Pripyat-1 underpass

Recently, a friend of Garik ľ Melnik, who worked as a guide, went missing. Garik is very worried, and since he can't check himself, he assigned me this task. The last PDA signal from Melnik indicates he is in the Pripyat-1 underpass. Need to investigate the underpass.
"Missing Guide": Find Melnik
Melnik's PDA signal is still active and coming from the underpass. Need to check the signal source.
"Missing Guide": Rescue Melnik
Looks like Melnik is captive. Need to free him by securing the area from enemies.
"Missing Guide": Talk to Melnik
Melnik is saved, need to talk to him.
"Missing Guide": Return to Garik with Melnik
Walk back to Garik together with Melnik.
"Missing Guide": Talk to Garik
Receive your reward from Garik.
"Expiation of Sins": Find Anabiotics and Living Water
You need to bring 10 anabiotics and living water to atone for your sins before the "Monolith". You should visit the medic in Zaton; he might know something.
"Expiation of Sins": Help the Medic Find the First Aid Kit
The medic in Zaton agreed to tell me everything he knows about living waterŚbut not for free. I need to find his universal first aid kit.
"Expiation of Sins": Exchange the First Aid Kit for Information about Living Water
Give the first aid kit to the medic and receive information about living water.
"Expiation of Sins": Ask Ozersky About the Water
The medic hinted that Ozersky might know more about this. You need to talk to Ozersky.
"Expiation of Sins": Find Living Water on the Oasis Territory
Ozersky claims that somewhere on the Oasis territory there should be living water.
"Expiation of Sins": Bring Living Water and Anabiotics to Cyborg
Living water and anabiotics have been found, you need to take them to Cyborg.
"Expiation of Sins": Find 10 Anabiotics
Living water has been found, but I don't have 10 anabiotics yet. Need to find them as soon as possible and take them to Cyborg.
"Expiation of Sins": Talk to the New Brothers
Living water will help our brothers heal. They would like to talk with me.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 1st Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 2nd Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 3rd Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 4th Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 5th Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 6th Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 7th Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 8th Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Fill the 9th Monolith Cache

I need to restore the "Monolith" caches and stashes. For this, I must put into the cache marked on the map: 1) AK-74 or LR-300 or SPAS 12, and one magazine for the corresponding weapon. 2) Batteries or homemade batteries for the Gauss gun. 3) Any first aid kit, any bandage, and either an anti-radiation drug or psychodeline.
"Expiation of Sins": Report to Cyborg
All Monolith caches in Zaton have been stocked. You need to talk to Cyborg.
"Expiation of Sins": Receive the Reward
Collect your reward from the Monolith trader.
"Expiation of Sins": Find the Subspace Relay

The Monolith followers want to repair their antenna to communicate with the higher intelligence - "Monolith". The main component of such an antenna is the subspace relay, which was destroyed. After the death of the spiritual leader Adept, the location of the subspace relay became a secret. You must obtain information about this relay at any cost.
"Expiation of Sins": Get More Information About the Relay

I managed to get information about the relay's location. According to Sych, the relay may be located inside the Jupiter factory, in the inner buildings, and reportedly weighs about 200 kg. This information may be unreliable; I need to get info from another informant and compare to determine the exact location.
"Expiation of Sins": Get More Information About the Relay

I managed to get information about the relay's location. According to the Hawaiian, the relay is on the territory of the Jupiter factory and is quite heavy. This information may be unreliable; I need to get info from another informant and compare to determine the exact location.
"Expiation of Sins": Get More Information About the Relay

I managed to get information about the relay's location. According to Ozersky, the relay may be located in the radio engineering department of the Jupiter factory, weighing about 200 kg. The subspace relay may still be inside one of the containers. This information may be unreliable; I need to get info from another informant and compare to determine the exact location.
"Expiation of Sins": Find the Subspace Relay
The relay location information has been cross-checked. The coordinates from the informants match. I need to verify.
"Expiation of Sins": Talk to Cyborg
The subspace relay has been found, but it is too heavy. I need to report the finding to Cyborg.
"Expiation of Sins": Talk to the Outcast
Cyborg ordered to take one of the antennas from the infidels. I must lead our brothers into battle.
"Expiation of Sins": Escort the Squad to the "Books" Store
I need to escort our brothers to the "Books" store.
"Expiation of Sins": Take Back the "Books" Store
Eliminate the infidels barricaded inside the "Books" store.
"Expiation of Sins": Start Repairing the Antennas
Order the Monolith followers to begin repairing the antennas.
"Expiation of Sins": Talk to Cyborg
Return to Cyborg.
"Expiation of Sins": Receive the Reward
Collect the reward from the trader Mitrofan.
"Expiation of Sins": Wait for the Antenna Repair to Finish
Wait until the antenna repair is completed.
"Expiation of Sins": Return to the Temple
The antenna repair is finished. You need to visit the brothers in the Temple.
"Expiation of Sins": Make Contact with the "Monolith"
Use the antenna to communicate with the "Monolith". The Monolith will show me the way.
Informant's Orders: Power Armor Modification
Bring the found information to the Informant.
The Informant asked you to complete an order to find information on the modification of new power armors needed by Garin.
Informant's Orders: Assault Rifle Modification
Bring the found PDA to the Informant.
The Informant asked you to complete an order to find information on the modification of new assault rifles needed by Kardan.
Informant's Orders: Sniper Rifle Modification
Bring the found blueprints to the Informant.
The Informant asked you to complete an order to find information on the modification of new sniper rifles needed by Azot.
Vobla's Debts: Eliminate the Dawn Stalker Group

The stalker Vobla, killed by you at the Dredge, owed a debt to the local authority Sultan. Now you have to pay off his debt. Sultan ordered to eliminate a group of Dawn faction stalkers located at the cement plant.
Vobla's Debts: Report the Elimination of the Dawn Squad
The Dawn squad has been eliminated. You need to report this to Hawaiian and receive further instructions.
Vobla's Debts: Meet with Sultan's Agent
Hawaiian gave you information about the need to meet Sultan's agent near the railway station.
Vobla's Debts: Escort the Agent along the Route
Sultan's agent must complete the assigned task, and you have to escort him to the checkpoint.
Vobla's Debts: Find Three "Night Star" Artifacts
Sultan's agent gave you the final request of his leader in this matter ľ to find three valuable artifacts that Vobla was supposed to bring him.
Vobla's Debts: Bring Artifacts to the Sultan
Give the found artifacts to the Sultan to fully settle Vobla's debts.
In Search of Mayron: Check the Area Near the Burnt Farmstead
Sych is interested in the fate of stalker Mayron who went missing recently. Try to find him.
In Search of Mayron: Follow the Location Indicated in the Note
The note from Mayron mentions the VNZ-circle object. Go there and try to find the cargo left by stalkers.
In Search of Mayron: Eliminate the Controller
Kill the Controller.
In Search of Mayron: Report to Sych
Return to Sych and give him the found items.
Grenade Clusters: Bring Necessary Information to Azot
Azot needs detailed information to create clustered grenades. It is necessary to obtain it.
Grenade Clusters: Bring Necessary Tools to Azot
Azot needs special tools to create clustered grenades. It is necessary to obtain them.
Grenade Clusters: Find Special Tools and Information for Azot
To improve the grenades, Azot needs special tools and detailed blueprints. Find them for him, first asking the station inhabitants for leads.
Grenade Clusters: All Necessary Items Delivered
Azot has received the information and tools. He can now start improving the grenades.
Spatial Anomaly: Ask Sych About the New Anomaly
German is looking for information about a spatial anomaly and asked you to visit Sych for possible details.
Spatial Anomaly: Ask Noah About the Compass Artifact
Sych has only part of the information; you need to get the rest from the stalker hermit Noah.
Spatial Anomaly: Go to the Southern Plateau and Find the Compass Artifact
Noah told where he last found a similar artifact. You should follow his advice and search for the artifact there.
Spatial Anomaly: Deliver the Artifact to the Scientists
Return to the scientists and give the artifact to German for study.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Meet the Agent
You need to meet with the Freedom scout to receive further instructions.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Destroy Kharanĺs Squad
One of the Duty squads that actively participated in destroying the secret Freedom base was the squad of the experienced Duty commander Kharan. Destroy him.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Report the Operation Results to Anubis
Kharanĺs squad is destroyed. He can no longer harm Freedom. Tell Anubis about this and get further instructions.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Interrogate the Prisoner

Anubis identified a traitor named Gusak among the Freedom members who secretly leaked all information to Duty. The snitch awaits deserved punishment. But first, you need to interrogate him and get the needed information.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Destroy Shaitanĺs Punishment Squad
Gusak didnĺt resist long and before execution told where Shaitan and his men will be soon.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Meet Anubis
Shaitan has paid for his role in the massacre of the Freedom members. Meet Anubis to get new orders.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Eliminate the Disguised Duty Saboteurs
Anubis located where the Duty saboteurs will be. Destroy them.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Report to Loki
With Anubisĺs help, you dealt with three Duty squads. Report your progress to Loki.
Tremorĺs Task: Find Anabiotics and Bloodsucker Tentacles
Tremor asked you to find two anabiotics and three bloodsucker tentacles for him.
Sultanĺs Order: Talk to Chapaev
The Sultan asked me to talk to the bandit leader.
Tremor's Task: Find Anabiotics.
You managed to find the bloodsucker tentacles needed by Tremor; now you just need to find the anabiotics.
Tremor's Task: Find Tentacles.
You managed to get the anabiotics, now you just need to gather bloodsucker tentacles.
Tremor's Task: Deliver the Promise to the Client.
You have found everything Tremor needs; now you just need to deliver it to the client.
Violin Order: Talk to Professor Ozersky.
You need to question scientist Ozersky about the Violin artifact.
Violin Order: Ask for Advice from Boroda.
The conversation with the scientist didnĺt answer the main question Ś where to find the artifact. But maybe Boroda knows the answer.
Violin Order: Find the Artifact.
Boroda gave you a rough lead for finding the artifact. Itĺs most likely near psi anomalies.
Violin Order: Kill the Mercenaries.
Mercenaries tracked and attacked you. Kill them.
Violin Order: Take the Artifact.
Pick up the Violin artifact.
Violin Order: Deliver the Promise to the Client.
Bring the Violin artifact to the Freedom leader.
Wolfĺs Fall: Kill Phantom and His Stalkers.

Former prospector of the stalker camp in the Newcomersĺ village at the Cordon Ś stalker Wolf Ś for unknown reasons turned into a bandit and blackmailed you into signing up to kill his former comrade, Phantom.
Wolfĺs Fall: Take Phantomĺs PDA.
Phantom and his men are dead. You need to search his corpse and take his PDA.
Wolfĺs Fall: Deliver Phantomĺs PDA to Informant.
Give Phantomĺs PDA to the Informant for decoding.
Wolfĺs Fall: Talk to Wolf.
Go to the Dredger and try to reason with Wolf; if that fails, kill him.
Wolfĺs Fall: Kill Wolf.
Kill Wolf along with his gang.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Wait for Anubis.
The Freedom agent Anubis went to Zaton searching for Varg. Wait until he contacts you.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Meet Anubis.
Anubis arranged a meeting with you on Skadovsk in the captainĺs cabin Ś go there.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Deliver the Cargo to Varg.
Instead of ordering you to kill Varg, Anubis asked to deliver a package to him. Do it.
Freedomĺs Revenge: Talk to Anubis.
Return to Skadovsk and demand explanations from Anubis.
Meeting with Agent: Wait for Meeting Confirmation.
The SBU agent should inform you about where the meeting will take place.
Meeting with Agent: Meet the Agent.
Go to Shevchenko to meet the agent.
Secret Laboratories: Ask the Informant about the X-Labs.
You need to go to Skadovsk and learn more about the X-Labs.
Secret Laboratories: Find Information on All X-Labs.
You need to find information about all ten secret laboratories located in the Zone.
Secret Laboratories: Report to the Informant.
You have found information about all X-Labs, report this to the Informant.
Informantĺs Fate: Find Information on the Informantĺs Possible Arrival in the Zone.

The Informant, who knows almost everything about everyone in the Zone, does not know the most important thing Ś who he really is. Help him find out by finding something that confirms the Informantĺs story about how he got to the Zone.
Informantĺs Fate: Talk to Garin.

You found a secret order from O-Consciousness saying that a certain Shram was sent to the Zone the same way as the Informant. You need to ask former Clear Sky members, who might have known Shram, about him. Perhaps a former Clear Sky technician knew Shram, check it out.
Informantĺs Fate: Talk to Nimble.
This rogue surely dealt with some shady characters. Ask him about Shram.
Informantĺs Fate: Report the Search Results to the Informant.
Now everything is clear. Mercenary Shram and the Informant are one and the same. Tell him this.
Order for the Eye: Find the Eye Artifact.
Order for the Eye: Bring Garin the promised artifact.
For Garin to start creating experimental grenades, you need to bring him a rare artifact Ś the Eye. Get all the details about where to find the artifact from Garik.
Boroda's Assignment: Find the "Nut" and "Drill" artifacts.
Boroda hired you to find two rare artifacts Ś "Nut" and "Drill." Find them after getting a lead from a stalker named Lemur.
Boroda's Assignment: Find the "Nut" artifact.
You managed to find the "Drill" artifact; now you just need to find the "Nut" artifact.
Boroda's Assignment: Find the "Drill" artifact.
You managed to find the "Nut" artifact; now you just need to find the "Drill" artifact.
Boroda's Assignment: Deliver the promised items to the client.
You found both artifacts Boroda needs; now just deliver them to the client.
Bioradar: Obtain the Phoenix Bioradar.
To get the Phoenix lifeform detector, you need to complete several tasks for local scientists necessary to improve their existing prototype.
Biological Materials: Deliver six types of biological samples to Herman.

To create the bioradar, you need to collect consumable biological materials. Bring Herman ten snark tails, five bloodsucker tentacles, three burers' hands, one controller's hand, one chimera claw, and one pseudogiant eye.
Biological Materials: Deliver samples of the remaining five types.
You have delivered one of the six required types of biological samples; collect the remaining five.
Biological Materials: Deliver samples of the remaining four types.
You have delivered two of the six required types of biological samples; collect the remaining four.
Biological Materials: Deliver samples of the remaining three types.
You have delivered three of the six required types of biological samples; collect the remaining three.
Biological Materials: Deliver samples of the remaining two types.
You have delivered four of the six required types of biological samples; collect the remaining two.
Biological Materials: Deliver a sample of one remaining type.
You have delivered five of the six required types of biological samples; collect the last one.
Biological Materials: Receive further instructions from Herman.
You have collected all the biological samples Herman needs; now get additional instructions from him.
Consumables: You need to bring Ozersky artifacts of four types.
To create the bioradar, it is necessary to collect artifacts as consumables for experiments. Bring Ozersky the following artifacts: three "Meat chunks" two "Wrenched" two "Sparkles" and one "Eye."
Consumables: Bring artifacts of the remaining three types.
You have brought one of the four required artifact types; collect the remaining three.
Consumables: Bring artifacts of the remaining two types.
You have brought two of the four required artifact types; collect the remaining two.
Consumables: Bring artifacts of the last remaining type.
You have brought three of the four required artifact types; collect the last one.
Consumables: Receive further instructions from Ozersky.
You have found all the artifacts needed for the experiments; now get additional instructions from Ozersky.
Anomaly Scanners: Bring the thermal anomaly scanner to Garin.
Anomaly Scanners: Bring the psi-static anomaly scanner to Garin.
Anomaly Scanners: Bring the gravitational symbiont scanner to Garin.
Anomaly Scanners: Bring the chemical anomaly scanner to Garin.
Anomaly Scanners: Retrieve the scanner located in the thermal anomaly.
Anomaly Scanners: Retrieve the scanner located in the psi-static anomaly.
Anomaly Scanners: Retrieve the scanner located in the gravitational anomaly.
Anomaly Scanners: Retrieve the scanner located in the chemical anomaly.
To complete work on the bioradar, it is necessary to collect anomaly scanners with obtained measurements. Bring four scanners from anomalies of different types located in the Zone to Garin.
Unknown Mutants: Destroy the group of unknown mutants.
The missing hunter Zubr managed to locate a group of unknown mutants near the "Sosnodub" anomaly. The mutant group is unstable and constantly changes its location. Track and destroy them.
Unknown Mutants: Head to the signal from Zubr's PDA.
The mutant group has been destroyed, but it remains to be found out what kind they are. Now you need to find Zubr. Follow the signal from his PDA.
Unknown Mutants: Tell Gonta about what happened.
Unfortunately, the hunter Zubr is dead, but the data collected on his PDA will help clarify the origin of the new mutated dog subtype. Deliver Zubr's PDA to Gonta.
Hunt for Unknown Mutants: Wait for Nightfall.
Zveroboy hired you to hunt unknown pseudo-snork mutants. Their activity will begin at night.
Hunt for Unknown Mutants: Get additional instructions from Zveroboy.
Before heading out, talk to Zveroboy to determine the locations of mutant dens.
Hunt for Unknown Mutants: Eliminate pseudo-snorks in the eastern tunnels.
One of the mutant sightings was in the eastern tunnel. Clear it out.
Hunt for Unknown Mutants: Eliminate pseudo-snorks inside the Jupiter factory territory.
The majority of pseudo-snorks were found inside the Jupiter factory. Clear the inner yard.
Hunt for Unknown Mutants: Eliminate pseudo-snorks in the Jupiter factory repair shop.
The majority of pseudo-snorks were found inside the Jupiter factory. Clear the repair shop.
Hunt for Unknown Mutants: Eliminate pseudo-snorks in the Jupiter factory main workshop.
The majority of pseudo-snorks were found inside the Jupiter factory. Clear the main workshop.
Hunt for Unknown Mutants: Talk to Zveroboy.
The Jupiter factory territory is cleared. Report the hunting results to Zveroboy.
Mysteries of the Past: Find and talk to Strelok.
Nazar believes only Strelok can shed light on the details of the Clear Sky clan's demise at the Chernobyl NPP. Verify this by talking to Strelok.
Mysteries of the Past: Find documents left by the Monolith member Kharon.

Strelok suggested that Lebedev and Kalancha might have survived like him. You need to find documents confirming this. Most likely, they could be hidden by the former Monolith leader Kharon Ś either at the Yubileynoye CBO or in the lab beneath it, it's unknown.
Mysteries of the Past: Find the Monolith stash with belongings of the Clear Sky clan leaders.
According to the order you found, the belongings of Lebedev and Kalancha are most likely hidden near the river port area.
Mysteries of the Past: Talk to Nazar.
Bring the found belongings to Nazar and discuss possible theories with him.
Unknown Prototype: Find three required components for Kardan.
To create item #58 or the Gauss pistol, Kardan first needs five "Flash" artifacts, a prototype Gauss pistol, and coil schematics. Find them.
Unknown Prototype: Find the pistol prototype and five "Flash" artifacts for Kardan.
You managed to find the wiring diagram; find the remaining two components.
Unknown Prototype: Find the wiring diagram and five "Flash" artifacts for Kardan.
You managed to find the pistol prototype; find the remaining two components.
Unknown Prototype: Find the pistol prototype and wiring diagram for Kardan.
You managed to find the necessary artifacts; find the remaining two components.
Unknown Prototype: Find five "Flash" artifacts for Kardan.
You managed to find the necessary schematics and prototype; find the artifacts.
Unknown Prototype: Find the wiring diagram for Kardan.
You managed to find the necessary artifacts and prototype; find the wiring diagram.
Unknown Prototype: Find the pistol prototype for Kardan.
You managed to find the necessary artifacts and schematic; find the prototype.
Unknown Prototype: Deliver the found components to Kardan.
You have found all the necessary components for creating the Gauss pistol. Give them to Kardan.
Unknown Prototype: Deliver the coil schematics to Azot.
Kardan cannot make the electromagnetic coils himself, so he asked you to talk to Azot to have the coils made.
Unknown Prototype: Question Hawaiian.
Azot needs radio components to make the coils. A courier was supposed to deliver them but lost contact. Find out from Hawaiian where the courier might be.
Unknown Prototype: Try to negotiate with Freedom stalkers.
The courier was taken hostage by Freedom stalkers over debts. Negotiate with them for his release.
Unknown Prototype: Talk to the courier.
Question the courier about the necessary parts.
Unknown Prototype: Retrieve the parts from the stash.
The courier managed to hide his goods and your parts in a stash. Retrieve them.
Unknown Prototype: Give the parts to Azot.
Deliver the parts you found to Azot so he can make the coils.
Unknown Prototype: Take the coils to Kardan.
Give the made coils to Kardan so he can finish the work.
Unknown Prototype: Wait for Kardan to finish the work.
Kardan needs time to complete the Gauss pistol.
Unknown Prototype: Collect the Gauss pistol from Kardan.
Kardan has likely finished the work; you need to come and evaluate it.
Drug Trafficking: Meet the smugglers.
Chapaev controls the drug trafficking route through the Zone. Some of his men are trying to cheat him. Find out from them the coordinates of the stash locations, then kill them.
Drug Trafficking: Eliminate the smugglers.
Kill all the smugglers.
Drug Trafficking: Search all the stashes.
Check all the smugglers' stashes and take the cargo stored there.
Drug Trafficking: Return to the gang leader.
Bring all the found drugs to Chapaev.
Drug Trafficking: Check the stash in Zaton.
Retrieve all cargo from the stash at the waste processing station area.
Drug Trafficking: Check the stash near the SAM site.
Retrieve all cargo from the stash at the Volkhov SAM site.
Drug Trafficking: Check the stash near the cement plant.
Retrieve all cargo from the stash under the destroyed bridge near the cement plant.
Perfect Protection: Talk to Uncle Yar.
Azot plans to create the perfect, advanced armor Ś a nano exoskeleton. He is interested in the opinions and advice of other technicians. Question them about Azot's plan.
Perfect Protection: Question Kardan.
Azot plans to create the perfect, advanced armor Ś a nano exoskeleton. He is interested in the opinions and advice of other technicians. Question them about Azot's plan.
Perfect Protection: Learn Garin's opinion.
Azot plans to create the perfect, advanced armor Ś a nano exoskeleton. He is interested in the opinions and advice of other technicians. Question them about Azot's plan.
Perfect Protection: Return to Azot.
Azot plans to create the perfect, advanced armor Ś a nano exoskeleton. You have learned the opinions of the other technicians; report them to Azot.
Perfect Protection: Find three necessary components for Azot.
To create the nano exoskeleton, Azot first needs two Clear Sky exoskeletons, nanokevlar plates, and information on servo motor improvements. Find them.
Perfect Protection: Find nanokevlar plates and two Clear Sky exoskeletons for Azot.
You have found the servo motor improvement information, find the other two components.
Perfect Protection: Find servo motor improvement info and two Clear Sky exoskeletons for Azot.
You have found the nanokevlar plates, find the other two components.
Perfect Protection: Find nanokevlar plates and servo motor improvement info for Azot.
You have found the required exoskeletons, find the other two components.
Perfect Protection: Find two Clear Sky exoskeletons for Azot.
You have found the schematics and nanokevlar plates, find two Clear Sky exoskeletons.
Perfect Protection: Find servo motor improvement info for Azot.
You have found the required exoskeletons and nanokevlar plates, find the servo motor improvement info.
Perfect Protection: Find nanokevlar plates for Azot.
You have found the required exoskeletons and schematics, find the nanokevlar plates.
Perfect Protection: Deliver the found components to Azot.
You have found all necessary components for the nano exoskeleton. Deliver them to Azot.
Perfect Protection: Meet with Professor Mironov.
Azot learned there is a possibility to create a nano exoskeleton with partial invisibility. The professor who knows about this technology is currently in Pripyat. Talk to him about it.
Perfect Protection: Eliminate the Monolith group near the Department Store.
Professor Mironov reported that his briefcase with documents was stolen by Monolith members. The radio beacon in the briefcase points to the Department Store building. Clear the area.
Perfect Protection: Repel the Monolith counterattack.
A squad of Monolith punishers is rushing to the sounds of the battle you caused. Destroy them.
Perfect Protection: Follow the radio beacon signal.
You have repelled the Monolith counterattack. Now you need to find the professor's briefcase.
Perfect Protection: Deliver the briefcase to Professor Mironov.
Give the found briefcase to its owner.
Perfect Protection: Give Azot the flash drive with the information.
Professor Mironov shared the information he has with you. Deliver it to Azot.
Perfect Protection: Wait for the work to finish.
Azot needs to finish the work. Wait about one day.
Perfect Protection: Collect the nano exoskeleton from Azot.
The nano exoskeleton is created. Accept the work from Azot.
Syndicate Investigation: Head to Zaton.
Go to Zaton and ask Sych about the laptop he sold.
Syndicate Investigation: Talk to Boroda.
Find out from Boroda about the bandits protecting Sych.
Syndicate Investigation: Wait for the bandits to appear.
Wait for the gang to show up in Zaton.
Syndicate Investigation: Eliminate the bandits.
The so-called protection for Sych has appeared in Zaton, you need to take them down.
Syndicate Investigation: Threaten Sych.
You have eliminated Sych's men, now you can safely threaten him if he doesn't return the mercenaries' laptop.
Syndicate Investigation: Intercept the courier.
Sych managed to pass the laptop to a courier, find him.
Syndicate Investigation: Chase the courier.
Sych's courier tried to run away without talking to you. Catch him, but don't kill him.
Syndicate Investigation: Talk to the mercenary.
The courier is dead, talk to the mercenary who shot him.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Kill Professor Mironov and his guides.
Monolith technician Alf needs documents to create "transparent" weapon types. They are with Professor Mironov. It is known that the professor is trying to leave Pripyat via the overpass. Stop him.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Search Mironov's body.
Take all documentation from the professor.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Deliver the case with documents to Alf.
Bring the found documents to the mechanic.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Find the Devil's Egg artifact.
Alf needs to synthesize a special material, for which he requires the Devil's Egg artifact. It might be somewhere in Pripyat near one of the anomalies.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Deliver the artifact to Alf.
You found the artifact needed by the mechanic. Give it to the client.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Activate all modular reducers.
Alf needs time to finish his work. While he is busy, complete his request and activate three modular reducers required for the stable operation of Monolith's repeaters.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Return to Alf.
Alf has most likely finished the unique weapon. Go to him and receive the promised sample.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Activate a modular reducer.
Activate the modular reducer in Pripyat.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Activate a modular reducer.
Activate the modular reducer on Jupiter.
On the Edge of Fantasy: Activate a modular reducer.
Activate the modular reducer in Zaton.
Mercenary Patrols: Destroy the patrol on the way to the cement factory.
You need to destroy the mercenary patrol to ensure the scouts' retreat to the cement factory.
Mercenary Patrols: Destroy the patrol along the road from Jupiter factory.
You need to destroy the mercenary patrol along the road from the Jupiter factory.
Mercenary Patrols: Destroy the patrol on the hill near the eastern tunnels.
You need to destroy the mercenary patrol on the hill near the eastern tunnels.
Mercenary Patrols: Report the patrols' destruction.
The mercenaries have been destroyed, report this to Marmedon.
Mutant Activity: Clear the area near the cement factory from mutants.
Duty scouts have spotted high poltergeist activity near the cement factory. Eliminate the mutants.
Mutant Activity: Repel the second wave.
Several controllers are leading a group of zombified stalkers from the direction of Pripyat. Eliminate them all.
Mutant Activity: Respond to the Duty member's signal.
The PDA of a missing Duty member is still active. Check the signal.
Stampede: Go to the designated area.

A large wave of mutants was spotted by Duty scouts coming from Pripyat. It's likely a stampede. Duty squads and stalkers from other clans have gathered at the only fortified point on the way to Yanov Station to stop the mutant breakthrough. Join the defense with the stalkers.
Stampede: Repel the first wave of mutants.
The mutants are attacking nonstop. Destroy all the monsters of the first wave.
Stampede: Repel the second wave of mutants.
The mutants are attacking nonstop. Destroy all the monsters of the second wave.
Stampede: Repel the third wave of mutants.
The mutants are attacking nonstop. Destroy all the monsters of the third wave.
Stampede: Repel the fourth wave of mutants.
The mutants are attacking nonstop. Destroy all the monsters of the fourth wave.
Stampede: Hold out until reinforcements arrive.
One of the Duty squads is on the way to help. Hold your position until they arrive.
Stampede: Report the successful operation to Captain Zvyagintsev.
The mutant stampede from Pripyat has been stopped. There is no longer any threat to Yanov Station. Report this to Captain Zvyagintsev.
Artifact Gatherers: Follow the PDA signal of the gatherer.
Locate one of the artifact gatherers by his PDA signal.
Artifact Gatherers: Head to the designated area.
The first gatherer thinks his partner is in trouble. Find out if that's true.
Artifact Gatherers: Retrieve the second half of the artifacts from the fallen Duty member and deliver everything to Hermann.
Mercenaries killed one of the Duty members. You must deliver all collected artifacts of both types to the scientists.
Artifact Gatherers: Report the mercenary incident to Shulga.
All artifacts have been delivered. Now speak with the lieutenant colonel about the mercenary attack.
Investigation: Talk to Shulga.
Captain Zvyagintsev reported developments in the mercenary attack situation. Get the details from Lieutenant Colonel Shulga.
Investigation: Meet with the Duty special agent Varg.
Shulga informed you about new findings on the incident. The main investigation is being led by the Duty saboteur Varg. Speak to him.
Investigation: Wait for the Freedom traitor to make contact.
Varg shared a possible version of what happened. Wait for the Freedom member to contact you.
Investigation: Interrogate the informant.
Now you need to interrogate the Freedom informant to clarify the situation.
Investigation: Report your findings to Varg.
Meet with Varg for further instructions.
Investigation: Go to the location of the Duty saboteur squad.
Meet with the commander of the saboteur squad Ś Marmedon.
Tunnel Rats: Talk to Shaytan.
Shulga has decided to eliminate the Freedom fighters and mercenaries involved in the killing of Duty soldiers. Meet with the commander of the Duty strike squad, Shaytan.
Tunnel Rats: Clear the eastern tunnel.
Join Shaytan's squad and head to the eastern tunnels. Eliminate all mercenaries and Freedom fighters there.
Tunnel Rats: Take up a firing position at the designated location.
The tunnels have been cleared. Varg has sent a message over the radio that Sin squads are approaching the eastern tunnels. Take up a defensive position.
Tunnel Rats: Repel all enemy attacks.
The Sin faction is expected to attack any minute. Keep the tunnels under control.
Tunnel Rats: Eliminate the first Sin squad.
The Sin are attacking in two combat groups. Eliminate them.
Tunnel Rats: Eliminate the second Sin squad.
The Sin are attacking in two combat groups. Eliminate them.
Tunnel Rats: Report to Lieutenant Colonel Shulga.
The combat operation is complete. Report the results to the Duty leader.
Conspiracy: Gather information about the Duty members.
This whole parcel situation seems like a planned provocation that you'll have to take part in. Try to find out how Kanevsky is connected to the Avenger.
Conspiracy: Return to the Avenger.
Return to Skadovsk and demand an explanation from the Avenger.
Conspiracy: Find out where the Avenger went.
The stalker Avenger left Skadovsk. Ask Beard where he might have gone.
Conspiracy: Hack into Kanevsky's PDA.
Kanevsky's PDA is locked. Try to convince three local hackers to help you unlock it.
Conspiracy: Talk to Azot.
Only Azot might be able to help you unlock the Duty member's PDA.
Conspiracy: Find out where the Avenger went.
Ask Hawaiian if the Avenger passed through here.
Conspiracy: Meet with the Avenger.
The Avenger made contact and scheduled a meeting. Head to the meeting point.
Conspiracy: Search the Avenger's stash.
Retrieve all documents stored in the stalker's stash.
Conspiracy: Decide what to do next.
The documents contain crucial information regarding a conspiracy against loners at Skadovsk. Faction leaders will definitely be interested in them.
Clear Threat: Rally stalkers to defend Skadovsk.
Convince three group leaders to help defend Skadovsk from the bandits.
Clear Threat: Report the results to Beard.
Return to Beard for further instructions.
Clear Threat: Talk to Owl.
The defenders of Skadovsk will need a large supply of ammo. Convince Owl to give you some.
Clear Threat: Eliminate the bandit gang.
Owl will only give you the ammo if you eliminate the bandits interfering with his business.
Clear Threat: Return to Owl.
The gang is dead. Demand that Owl hand over the promised ammunition.
Clear Threat: Find the bandit stash.
Owl, that bastard, botched things again. You'll have to look for the ammo in a bandit stash somewhere near the Emerald.
Clear Threat: Deliver the ammo crate to Beard.
The bandit stash has been found. Deliver the retrieved ammo to Beard.
Clear Threat: Plant explosives around Skadovsk.
Plant five remote-controlled bombs disguised as regular backpacks with loot.
Clear Threat: Report to Beard.

Everything is ready for the bandit assault: people are warned, ammo is secured, and explosives are planted. The detonators are with Granit, who will lead the defense. Discuss the remaining details with Beard.
Clear Threat: Plant a mine near the road.
Plant a booby-trapped backpack near the road to the Forestry.
Clear Threat: Plant a mine north of Skadovsk.
Plant a booby-trapped backpack to cover the northern approach near the Boiler anomaly.
Clear Threat: Plant a mine west of Skadovsk.
Plant a booby-trapped backpack to cover the western approach from the burned hamlet.
Clear Threat: Plant a mine south of Skadovsk.
Plant a booby-trapped backpack to cover the southern approach from the Shevchenko barge.
Clear Threat: Plant a mine east of Skadovsk.
Plant a booby-trapped backpack to cover the eastern approach from the port cranes.
Clear Threat: Meet with Granit.
Ask Granit to help in the defense against the bandit attack.
Clear Threat: Meet with Klen.
Ask Klen to take part in repelling the bandit attack.
Clear Threat: Meet with Sokol.
Ask Sokol to take part in repelling the bandit attack.
Project Source: Locate the mercenary near the Jubilee Complex.
Colonel Samoylov believes the mercenaries will attempt to infiltrate the lab beneath Pripyat again. Try to locate the syndicate scout reported by recon.
Project Source: Deliver the mercenaryĺs PDA to the colonel.
The mercenary is deadŚwhat killed him remains unknown. All he had was a PDA. Hand it over to the operation commander.
Project Source: Speak with the Informant.
You need to find out more about the mentioned project. The Informant might be able to help you.
Project Source: Question Owl.
The Informant shared some very useful information, but couldnĺt say for certain what Project ôSourceö is. Maybe Owl can clarify things.
Project Source: Meet with Ozersky.
Owl tipped you off that local scientists might know something about the project youĺre investigating. Go check it out.
Project Source: Ask Molfar about the mercenaries.
The head of the local mercenaries might know something about the syndicate's activities in Pripyat. He could help you understand the situation.
Project Source: Stop the mercenaries' deal with the client.
Despite Serbin's group's failure, the mercenaries managed to recover some data from the lab. You must stop them from handing it over to their client.
Project Source: Search the bodies of mercenary and Alpha leaders.
Collect any data storage devices from the bodies of the killed mercenaries and clients.
Project Source: Deliver all data to Colonel Samoylov.
Meet the colonel and report the results of the operation.
Project Source: Eliminate the Alpha sabotage teams in Pripyat.
Several Alpha squads have infiltrated the city. Wipe them all out.
Project Source: Report to the colonel.
All foreign agent squads have been eliminated. Go see the colonel for further orders.
Project Source: Eliminate the Alpha squad near the hospital.
Eliminate one of the sabotage groups in the eastern part of Pripyat.
Project Source: Eliminate the Alpha squad near the dormitory.
Eliminate one of the sabotage groups in the southern part of Pripyat.
Project Source: Eliminate the Alpha squad near the school.
Eliminate one of the sabotage groups in the central part of the city.
Skadovsk Siege: Proceed to the marked location.
A signal about an impending attack on Skadovsk has been receivedŚsomeone managed to warn the others. Find out who it was and assess the situation.
Skadovsk Siege: Repel the first wave.
Bandits arenĺt the best fighters, but their numbers make them dangerous. The first assault is a probing attackŚjust rookies and expendables. The main force is holding back.
Skadovsk Siege: Repel the second wave.
This time, the thugs are attacking from three directions in larger numbers. Donĺt let them reach the ship.
Skadovsk Siege: Eliminate enemy snipers.
A sniper team has taken position on a small elevation near the shipŚneutralize them.
Skadovsk Siege: Repel the third wave.
This time the enemy will attack from all directions in large groups. They donĺt care about losses, so donĺt expect them to retreat.
Skadovsk Siege: Eliminate the bandit leaders.

A stalker spotted a group of heavily armed bandits in exoskeletons near the burnt farmstead and relayed their coordinates to you. They were observing the siegeŚmost likely the bandit commanders. Eliminate them before they relocate.
Skadovsk Siege: Repel the final bandit assault.

Even the death of their leaders didnĺt stop the remaining bandits. This time, theyĺre throwing everything they have at you. Stop them Ś but be careful around the mined zones. Granit has decided itĺs time to detonate the charges.
Skadovsk Siege: Meet the unknown stalker.
The siege is over Ś all bandits have been eliminated. Speak with the unknown stalker who came to your aid.
In the Heart of Madness: Talk to Huron.
Meet Monolith field commander Huron and ask about the factionĺs new recruits.
In the Heart of Madness: Plant bugs on all Monolith recruits.
Each new member must receive a weapon with a tracking device to help identify the mole among them.
In the Heart of Madness: Speak with Monolith member Kerak.
Give the bugged rifle to the sect recruit located near the River Port.
In the Heart of Madness: Speak with Monolith member Gort.
Give the bugged rifle to the sect recruit at the Hospital.
In the Heart of Madness: Speak with Monolith member Shaman.
Give the bugged rifle to the sect recruit inside the "Books" store.
In the Heart of Madness: Speak with Monolith member Iceman.
Give the bugged rifle to the sect recruit near the "Jubilee" complex.
In the Heart of Madness: Report to the colonel.
Return to the colonel and wait for one of the trackers to activate.
In the Heart of Madness: Follow the signal.
The Monolith mole has made contact with Alpha Ś head to the location where the signal was picked up.
In the Heart of Madness: Kill the controllers.
Eliminate all controllers.
In the Heart of Madness: Report the failure to the colonel.
Unfortunately, the Monolith mole and everyone he met are dead. Report this to the colonel.
In the Heart of Madness: Go to the Jupiter Plant.
The colonel informed you that a mercenary group captured several of Anubisĺ accomplices. Go meet them.
In the Heart of Madness: Interrogate Ares.
Interrogate the captured fake Freedom member Ś one of Anubisĺ men.
In the Heart of Madness: Prevent the factions from meeting.
Sinner and Monolith squads are supposed to meet at the old SAM site Ś make sure itĺs their last meeting.
In the Heart of Madness: Meet with the agent.
Youĺve wiped out several enemy squads. Report to the intelligence agent.
The Missing Group: Talk to Beard.
Ask Beard about Swordĺs group and their possible route.
The Missing Group: Search the area near the port cranes.
Granit and Beard tasked you with investigating the disappearance of Swordĺs group. A faint PDA signal was picked up near the port cranes Ś head there.
The Missing Group: Eliminate the Sinnersĺ raid squad.
Freedom member Zhuk was supposed to meet the Sinners here. He fears it might be a setup Ś donĺt let the Sinners kill him.
The Missing Group: Go to the containers.
Zhuk managed to inform you that he heard gunfire in the container yard right after Swordĺs group entered Ś follow them.
The Missing Group: Head to the gas station.
The old gas station was a key point on Swordĺs route Ś go there.
The Missing Group: Kill those damn chimeras.
Looks like the stalkers were attacked by mutants here Ś and now it's your turn. Kill the monsters.
The Missing Group: Follow the PDA signal.
You've picked up a clear signal from Swordĺs PDA Ś he might still be alive. Find him immediately.
The Missing Group: Report to Granit.
Unfortunately, the entire Sword group is dead. A madman from the Sinners, called Smoker, is responsible. Tell Granit what happened.
The Missing Group: Wait for scouts to locate Smoker.
Granit has sent scouts to the sawmill area, where Smoker was last seen. Wait for intel from the reconnaissance.
The Missing Group: Eliminate the Sinners at the sawmill.
The scouts found a large group of Sinners at the sawmill. Smoker is among them. Donĺt let anyone escape.
The Missing Group: Report to Granit.
Smoker and another Sinner field commander have been eliminated Ś Sword has been avenged. Inform Granit.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Talk to Legolas.
Granit has learned the details of Swordĺs mission and that another group Ś stalkers from Dawn and Freedom Ś also went missing. Speak with Legolas, the Dawn faction representative at Zaton.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Meet with the leader of the rescue team, Klen.
Legolas reported the group went missing near the foresterĺs house. Meet with the rescue squad commander Ś a joint group of neutrals, Freemen, and Dawn fighters.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Proceed to the Foresterĺs Territory.
Head to the foresterĺs area, where the group was last heard from. Search the zone with Freedom fighters while Dawn and neutrals cover your flank.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Speak with Freedom squad leader Hannibal.
The joint Dawn and Freedom team has been wiped out, likely by the Sinners. Find out what Hannibal thinks about this.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Repel the sudden bandit attack.
The Sinners werenĺt responsible Ś it was the bandits, who regrouped after their failure at Skadovsk. Two squads are attacking from different directions Ś eliminate them.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Repel the second bandit assault.
The bandits are launching an even larger second assault Ś clearly someone is pushing them. Hold your ground.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Hold the line at the foresterĺs house.
Donĺt let the enemy take this strategically important location.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Return to Skadovsk.
Return to Skadovsk immediately and inform Legolas about what happened.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Eliminate the Sinner squad advancing from the port cranes.
The Sinners were backing the bandits and are preparing a final assault. Destroy their strike teams.
Vengeance of the Fallen: Eliminate the Sinner squad advancing from Preobrazhensky Bridge.
The Sinners were backing the bandits and are preparing a final assault. Destroy their strike teams.
Traces of Truth: Talk to Nazar.
Hawaiian said that Nazar may have information about the nature of psi-control over the Sinners. Find out if that's true.
Traces of Truth: Supply all Dawn faction stashes.
Nazar promised to share his intel only if you help his faction by organizing five supply stashes around Jupiter and Yanov Station.
Traces of Truth: Return to Nazar.
All the faction's stashes are now stocked. Time for Nazar to reveal what he knows.
Traces of Truth: Locate stalker Mirovoyĺs missing group.
The leader of Dawn said stalker Mirovoy uncovered the secret of the Sinners, but likely paid for it with his life. His PDA is still active Ś follow the signal.
Traces of Truth: Deliver Mirovoyĺs PDA to Legolas.
Head to Zaton and report the findings to Legolas.
Traces of Truth: Place a stash northwest of the checkpoint.
The stash must include: one military medkit and ration, a faction uniform (special helmet and armor), a weapon (Steyr AUG A2, AEK 971, or AS VAL with matching ammo), and a "Veles" anomaly detector.
Traces of Truth: Place a stash west of Jupiter Plant.
The stash must include: one military medkit and ration, a faction uniform (special helmet and armor), a weapon (Steyr AUG A2, AEK 971, or AS VAL with matching ammo), and a "Veles" anomaly detector.
Traces of Truth: Place a stash south of the Eastern Tunnels.
The stash must include: one military medkit and ration, a faction uniform (special helmet and armor), a weapon (Steyr AUG A2, AEK 971, or AS VAL with matching ammo), and a "Veles" anomaly detector.
Traces of Truth: Place a stash south of the Cement Factory.
The stash must include: one military medkit and ration, a faction uniform (special helmet and armor), a weapon (Steyr AUG A2, AEK 971, or AS VAL with matching ammo), and a "Veles" anomaly detector.
Traces of Truth: Place a stash north of the Container Warehouse.
The stash must include: one military medkit and ration, a faction uniform (special helmet and armor), a weapon (Steyr AUG A2, AEK 971, or AS VAL with matching ammo), and a "Veles" anomaly detector.
Offensive: Capture the Container Warehouse.
Eliminate all Sinners occupying the Container Warehouse to secure a path toward their main base at Jupiter Plant.
One Step Ahead: Wait for the designated time.
Legolas has accepted your intel and is planning a preemptive strike against the Sinners. Wait for the operation to begin.
One Step Ahead: Go to the designated location.
Meet with the leader of the strike group Ś a stalker named Anurak Ś at the designated spot.
One Step Ahead: Disrupt the meeting between Sinners and Alpha operatives.
Join Anurakĺs fighters and move to the meeting point between Alpha and Sin. Eliminate all hostile forces.
One Step Ahead: Pursue the Sinner leader Demonolog.
The Sinner field commander, Demonolog, escaped death. He is likely trying to flee toward a specified location.
One Step Ahead: Eliminate the Sinners trying to seize the "Krug" Research Facility.
Demonolog has escaped. His forces are trying to take over the Krug Institute. Destroy them.
One Step Ahead: Speak with Lynx.
The Sinners have been wiped out, but their leader vanished. Ask the scout Lynx what he thinks.
One Step Ahead: Check the underground tunnel exit north of Krug.
Demonolog likely escaped through the underground tunnel. Investigate it.
One Step Ahead: Kill the traitor.
Stalker Granit turned out to be the traitor behind the ambushes at the foresterĺs house and the deaths of the Sword and Freedom groups. He deserves death.
One Step Ahead: Return to Skadovsk and report to Legolas.
Report the outcome of the operation to Legolas.
To Pripyat: Clear the Pripyat-1 underpass of enemy forces.

Osiris has confessed everything. The Sin factionĺs bases are destroyed. The areas around Jupiter and Yanov Station are safe again. The remaining Sinners have retreated to Pripyat through the underground underpass, where Monolith cultists will likely assist them. Fight your way into the city, but first clear the underpass.
For Freedom: Convince Loki to cooperate.
After the area around Yanov Station is cleared of Sinners, Shulga has agreed to send an expeditionary squad to Pripyat to continue the fight against the cultists. Convince Loki to do the same.
For Freedom: Meet with the Freedom squad commander Hannibal.
Loki is also willing to support you. He is already planning an assault on the Sinners occupying a key location near Jupiter Plant. Talk to Hannibal about launching the attack.
For Freedom: Capture the key checkpoint.
Eliminate all Sinners in the abandoned checkpoint area.
For Freedom: Hold the checkpoint against all enemy counterattacks.
Despite the loss of their commanders, the Sinners are attempting to retake the lost position. Defeat both cultist strike teams.
For Freedom: Repel the enemy's northern assault.
Eliminate the Sinner combat group attacking from the quarry direction.
For Freedom: Repel the enemy's southern assault.
Eliminate the Sinner combat group attacking from the ventilation complex.
For Freedom: Secure the designated position.

All Sinner attacks have been repelled. The key checkpoint is now under Freedom's control. Duty and Dawn are preparing to drive the Sinners out of the Container Warehouse. Secure the designated location to support the offensive.
Enemy in Reflection: Consult the Informant.
The SBU agent you were supposed to report to was killed before your eyes. Speak with the Informant Ś he might know who carried out such sabotage.
Enemy in Reflection: Eliminate the dangerous mutants.
The Informant suspects a Freedom member who recently visited Skadovsk. Right after their arrival, strange and dangerous mutants appeared near the Emerald area. Go there and eliminate the creatures.
Enemy in Reflection: Meet with Anubis.
Anubis, whom youĺve been searching for all this time, has finally reached out. This conversation may prove crucial.
Enemy in Reflection: Talk to Loki.

The conversation with Anubis deeply puzzled you. On one hand, you still want to shoot him on sight, but on the other, you now have many questions Ś including Loki's potential involvement. Speak with the Freedom leader at Yanov.
Enemy in Reflection: Head to the Substation Workshops.
Your suspicions about Loki were unfounded Ś in fact, he wants Anubis dead too. It was likely his tip that helped the mercs capture the beast. Head to Zaton and talk to their leader, Hog.
Enemy in Reflection: Interrogate Anubis before the execution.
Anubis has finally been captured. And he deserves death. Speak to him before the execution.
Enemy in Reflection: Wait for the execution to finish.
Wait until the mercenaries finish the job.
Enemy in Reflection: Report to the Colonel in Pripyat.
Something inexplicable has occurred. All the mercenaries died instantly, and Anubis vanished. Report this to Colonel Samoylov and decide on your next move.
Just Retribution: Coordinate with Hemul on a joint assault.

The main forces of the Sin faction active in Zaton have been crushed Ś but many of their most ruthless members remain. It's been reported that theyĺve gathered on the ôShevchenkoö vessel for some sort of ritual. Stalker Hemul, who recently arrived in Zaton, is preparing an attack. Assist him.
Just Retribution: Eliminate all Sin members on the ôShevchenko.ö
Hemul and his squad are preparing to strike immediately. Join the assault against the Sin cultists.
Just Retribution: Kill the psionic mutant.
The psionic mutant is one of the most dangerous creatures to emerge in the Zone recently. It seems these monsters are aiding the cult.
Just Retribution: Search the Demonologistĺs corpse.
That cult leader may have valuable information. Search his body.
Just Retribution: Return to Skadovsk and speak to Legolas.
Together with Hemul, you secured another victory over Sin. Many of their spiritual leaders were slain. Report back to Legolas.
Face to Face: Meet with Anubis.

The Sin clan has fallen. Their leader Aid is dead. The Monolith forces who supported them have retreated. One last problem remains Ś Anubis. And now, he has contacted you directly, requesting a face-to-face meeting.
Face to Face: Eliminate Anubis.
Youĺve made your choice. Kill Anubis and the remaining members of C-Consciousness.
Face to Face: Proceed to the marked location.
You received a signal from an unknown stalker requesting a meeting. Head to the pier.
Face to Face: Report to the Colonel about the elimination of the main enemy.
Go to Samoylov and tell him what happened.
Face to Face: Move to the marked location to meet with Monolith cultists.
Youĺve made your decision. Head to the marked area and contact the Monolith forces.
Face to Face: Something is happening to the C-Consciousness warriors. Wait it out.
A powerful psi-blow hit Anubis and the remaining C-Consciousness members. Wait until it ends.
Face to Face: Proceed to the marked location.
Youĺve received a signal from an unknown stalker requesting a meeting. Head to the pier.
Face to Face: Report to the Colonel about the elimination of the main enemy.
Go to Samoylov and tell him what happened.
Counterstrike: Head to the rally point.
Ajax has informed you that the Sin cultists are preparing a large-scale assault that must be repelled. Move to the rally point to meet with allies.
Counterstrike: Hold a defensive position at the marked location.
The first attack will target the stalker clans near the old barge. Provide support to them.
Counterstrike: Repel the first wave of the Sin attack.
The cultists are attacking from two directions to encircle your position. Don't let them succeed.
Counterstrike: Eliminate Sin cultists occupying the Preobrazhensky Bridge.
A strong group of cultists has taken a strategic position on the Preobrazhensky Bridge. Clear the area.
Counterstrike: Repel the second wave of the Sin attack.
Despite their commanderĺs death, the cultists have launched a second assault. Stop their advance.
Counterstrike: Return to Ajax.
The cultists have been thoroughly defeated. Report back to Ajax.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Secure the designated location.
Voland has asked you to assist with a Monolith cult operation in Zaton. Go there and meet with the saboteur leader, Janissary.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Eliminate the military unit inside the station building.
You must stop the military from recovering the cultĺs specialized equipment. Eliminate their special forces.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Air support.
The army special forces are receiving helicopter support. Janissary promised to take care of it, but you might want to handle it yourself just in case.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Plant explosives at the marked points.
Plant explosives at the station to destroy any trace of equipment used by the cult.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Move to a safe location.
