Withdraw to a safe distance to the marked area.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Wait for the Monolith saboteurs to detonate the charges.
The cultĺs equipment will be destroyed in the coming minutes. It will no longer fall into military hands.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Return to the Monolith temple.
Report to Voland about the successful completion of your task.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Plant a remote explosive near the compressor unit.
Plant explosives at three key locations where the cultĺs secret installations were hidden.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Plant a remote explosive near the backup generator.
Plant explosives at three key locations where the cultĺs secret installations were hidden.
Fall of the Black Hawk: Plant a remote explosive near the main station pipeline.
Plant explosives at three key locations where the cultĺs secret installations were hidden.
Pripyat Cleansing: Eliminate all cult forces at key points in the city.
Cultists from Monolith and Sin control many key sites in the city. Allies from Freedom, Dawn, and Duty clans are already engaged. Assist in destroying the enemy.
Pripyat Cleansing: Capture the Gastonom building.
Sin members have taken over the former grocery store building. Eliminate them.
Pripyat Cleansing: Secure the school building.
The cultists have fortified themselves in the local school. Clear them out.
Pripyat Cleansing: Eliminate enemies at the hospital grounds.
Take control of a key location Ś the hospital.
Pripyat Cleansing: Destroy the Monolith patrol in the northern part of the city.
Sin allies have increased patrol activity in Pripyat. Eliminate their patrol near the River Port.
Pripyat Cleansing: Destroy the Monolith patrol in the southern part of the city.
Monolith has increased patrol activity in Pripyat. Eliminate their patrol near the bookstore.
Secret Project: Respond to Osiris's signal.
The leader of the defeated Sin cult has contacted you personally and is ready to surrender.
Secret Project: Move to a safe distance.
Osiris Ś formerly known as the stalker Lis Ś told you the whole truth and is now ready to die for it. Move away to avoid being caught in the explosion.
Secret Project: Find Osirisĺs records.
Osiris willingly chose death. Now you must find his stash in one of the buildings in Pripyat (around the Gastonom area) to finally uncover the truth.
Secret Project: Talk to Colonel Samoylov.
The truth about the C-Consciousness, Anubisĺs connection to it, and Project S.T.A.L.K.E.R. is beginning to surface. Report it to your superiors.
Assault on "Yubileiny": Lead the combined stalker squad.

Key locations in the city have been cleared of cultists. The remaining Sin forces, led by Aid and supported by Monolith, have taken over the "Yubileiny" Research Center. Join stalkers and agents for a final assault on the cultistsĺ last stronghold.
Capture "Yubileiny": Clear the Research Center building.
Eliminate all cultists entrenched in the "Yubileiny" Research Center.
Assault on "Jupiter": Meet the mercenary squad.

Most key positions around Yanov station have been cleared of Sin forces. However, their main forces and field commander Osiris have retreated to the Jupiter plant. Meet up with the mercenaries to launch a joint assault.
Assault on "Jupiter": Clear the Jupiter Plant area.
Destroy all cultists defending the interior of the Jupiter plant.
Important Intel: Talk to the Informant.
The local Informant might have some crucial information you need. Go get it.
The Unknown Clan: Find the Dawn faction base.
Beard told you about a new faction recently appearing in the northern Zone. It might be worth checking out their baseů
Uncle Yarĺs Request: Find two "Indian Stone" artifacts.
Uncle Yar has decided to leave the stalker life and return to equipment repairs. His final job Ś finding two "Indian Stone" artifacts Ś is now up to you.
Uncle Yarĺs Request: Deliver the artifacts to Loki.
Hand over the artifacts to the Freedom leader and collect your reward.
New Assignment: Retrieve the Dawn exosuit.
Kochubey asked you to find a Dawn faction exoskeleton to deliver to bandits who arrived from the southern Zone.
New Assignment: Deliver the exosuit to the bandits.
Deliver the retrieved item to a bandit in the Garbage area.
Glukharĺs Tasks: Eliminate the pseudogiant near Skadovsk.
Glukhar Ś the stalker foreman at Skadovsk Ś has assigned you a job from the hunters to take down a highly dangerous mutant near the ship.
Glukharĺs Tasks: Return to Skadovsk.
Report back to Glukhar about the completed task.
Glukharĺs Tasks: Find 5 special M68 grenade bundles for the prospector.
Glukhar asked for your help in restocking his ammunition. Craft him some grenade bundles.
Glukharĺs Tasks: Deliver the 5 M68 grenade bundles to the prospector.
Hand over the crafted grenade bundles to the client.
Arrival: Find Akulov
This Akulov must know something about Balthazar. You need to find him.
Arrival: Talk to the checkpoint commander
Talk to the checkpoint commander.
Arrival: Wait for the guide stalker
Kulikov arranged with a soldier at the eastern checkpoint to guide you to the farm.
Arrival: Go to the farm with the stalker
The stalker base is located at the farm. The checkpoint commander asked one of his men to guide you there.
Arrival: Head to the farm
The guide is dead. Youĺll have to find the farm yourself.
Arrival: Head to the farm
You need to find the farm.
Arrival: Talk to the stalker leader
The stalkers have a leader at the base. Speak with him to learn about events in the Dark Valley.
Arrival: Help the stalkers
The stalker leader in the Dark Valley Ś Akulov Ś agreed to share what he knows, but only if you take care of a troublesome chimera first.
Bold Predator: Head to the ôFractureö anomaly
The chimera was last seen near the ôFractureö anomaly. It might be living there. Get closer to investigate.
Bold Predator: Fight the chimera
The chimera has been spotted. You need to take it down.
Bold Predator: Report to Akulov
To avoid unnecessary risk, it would be better to set up a defensive perimeter at the checkpoint near the farm. Inform Akulov of your plan.
Bold Predator: Talk to Leonid
Warn the checkpoint stalkers about the chimera. You need to tell Leonid about your plan.
Bold Predator: Find the chimera
Leonid and his men are reinforcing the checkpoint to repel the chimera. Now you just have to find and lure it there.
Bold Predator: Lure the chimera to the checkpoint
The chimera has been spotted again. Lead it to the checkpoint.
Bold Predator: Kill the chimera
The chimera is trapped. Finish it before it escapes.
Bold Predator: Talk to Akulov
The chimera is dead. Report back to Akulov.
Interception: Eliminate the cluster of snorks

Stalkers are preparing to assault the factory, currently controlled by renegades. To approach the factory, they must cross the bridge. The bridge is not safe right now Ś clusters of snorks have been spotted nearby. Clear the area near the bridge to solve this problem.
Interception: Eliminate the cluster of snorks
Take care of the cluster of snorks.
Interception: Gather with the squad at the main gates
Akulov has gathered the squad for the assault on the factory. You need to participate in the operation.
Interception: Follow the squad
Cross the bridge together with the squad.
Interception: Launch a surprise attack
Get as close as possible to the main factory gates to catch the renegades off guard.
Interception: Capture the factory
The squad has broken into the factory grounds. Eliminate all renegades and secure the factory.
Interception: Search the bodies of renegades
Some renegades might have valuable information on their PDAs. Search their bodies.
Interception: Deliver the found PDAs to Akulov
Give the PDAs collected from the renegades to Akulov.
